---
name: Score correction request
about: An evidence item is inaccurate, missing a source, or cited to the wrong document
title: "[correction] "
labels: correction
assignees: ''
---

> **Are you the scored subject or an authorized representative?** Please use the right-of-reply process described in [`DISCLAIMER.md`](../../DISCLAIMER.md): email **editorial@scoreourpresidents.org** instead of filing a public issue. We acknowledge within seven days and publish a determination within thirty days.
>
> Readers, journalists, and researchers — please continue below.

## Which evidence item

- **President file:** <!-- e.g., scores/joe_biden.yaml -->
- **Sub-criterion ID:** <!-- e.g., 7.3 -->
- **Evidence item (citation field or claim text):**

## What is inaccurate, under-sourced, or wrongly cited

<!-- Be specific. "The claim X says A but the source actually says B." -->

## Corrective source

<!-- A primary document or established tier-1 secondary source supporting the correction. URL + a short quoted passage if possible. -->

## Proposed wording (optional)

<!-- If you have a suggested replacement for the claim or citation field, include it here. We will edit for consistency with the framework's attribution conventions. -->

## Anything else

<!-- Other items affected by the same correction, related sub-criteria, etc. -->

---

By submitting this issue you confirm the corrective source is accurate to the best of your knowledge. The project will evaluate the correction on its merits and publish a determination in the changelog.
